display.purpose: Hero report headlines and first-run upload headlines.

headline.purpose: Section headings inside panels and evidence areas.

body.purpose: Narrative copy, explanations, metadata, and evidence prose.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, pills, category labels, chart labels, and tabs.

elevation.philosophy: Flat by default. Depth is communicated with tinted surfaces, fine borders, dividers, and selected states.

rules: Animate opacity, transform, border color, and background color.

uploadPanel.character: A centered, quiet intake surface with one clear action path.

heroSummary.character: A narrative report header, closer to a letter than a dashboard summary.

segmentedControls.character: Paper-toned controls with active options set into a lighter panel.

evidenceRows.character: Compact, selectable proof surfaces that stay readable when repeated.

rankedTrackCards.character: Slightly larger evidence cards with prominent rank numerals and compact chips.

dos: Keep the product observational, personal, and readable.
Use teal only for action, selection, and evidence.
Let warm paper neutrals carry most of the surface.
Use flat bordered panels before considering elevation.
donts: Do not make the interface feel like a corporate analytics dashboard.
Do not use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or hero metric templates.
Do not make dense identical card grids.
Do not introduce pure black or pure white as new tokens.
